result:
Only `model/train.py` was modified, as required — `runs/pending_experiment.json` and everything else are untouched pre-existing state.

Implementation is complete: `model/train.py` now has `compute_cell_weights` (one-time-per-area confusability map from `reference.tif`, excluding self+8-neighbor cells), a confusability-weighted crop-sampling distribution blended 50/50 with uniform in `train_area`, and `sample_epoch` draws using that weighted distribution instead of pure uniform. `calibrate_conf_shift` and `model/model.py` are untouched, matching the brief. Syntax check passes and a live functional test against berlin's data confirms valid probability distributions and successful weighted sampling.
